attacking_style: Insufficient data to establish clear attacking patterns. Limited observations show reactive rather than proactive racing as GC contender.
team_tactics: Insufficient data on team support patterns. Observations focus on individual defensive positioning rather than team-led offensive tactics.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine specific terrain strengths. Weakness exposed on selective stages under sustained tempo pressure.
vulnerability: Struggles when opponents' teams set sustained tempo on selective terrain. Defensive fragility as GC leader when absorbing pressure from stronger teams.
key_patterns: Vulnerable to organized team tempo tactics, losing 30+ seconds when rivals control pace
Defensive racing posture under pressure rather than counterattacking when challenged
First-time GC leadership experience shows gap versus established Grand Tour contenders
form_trajectory: negative: showed defensive weakness and time losses when facing sustained team-driven pressure from stronger GC rivals
